Tapestry Lawns

Takeaways

  • Mowing frequently (3-4 times per year) provides biodiversity and ensures ‘lawn-like’
  • Grow from seedlings in trays, cut tray’s worth from lawn and replace with seedling
  • Might be possible to do incrementally by working out from a point - either remove grass or mow more frequently to ensure it doesn’t dominate

MVP starter plan

  • Grow seedling trays x5  30 GBP
  • Use to replace about 1 m2 of lawn
  • rinse and repeat
